app.title: Threat Intelligence Reasoning Engine
app.description: Analyze IP addresses for potential security threats using multi-source intelligence.
form.ip_validation: Please enter a valid IP address
report.title: Threat Intelligence Report
report.score_hint: Threat score: 0 = safe, 100 = critical. Higher score = higher risk.
report.footer: Report generated by Threat Intelligence Reasoning Engine
summary.Low: {object_type} {object_value} shows minimal threat indicators. Final score: {final_score}/100. Safe for normal operations with monitoring.
summary.Medium: {object_type} {object_value} has moderate threat indicators. Final score: {final_score}/100. Recommend investigation before allowing.
summary.High: {object_type} {object_value} shows significant malicious activity. Final score: {final_score}/100. Alert and review required.
summary.Critical: {object_type} {object_value} shows critical threat indicators. Final score: {final_score}/100. Immediate containment recommended.
summary.Inconclusive: {object_type} {object_value} has conflicting evidence. Final score: {final_score}/100. More context needed for accurate assessment.
